_comment_top: ADR 039 Phase 1 — Azure Lighthouse offer customers deploy in THEIR own
Azure subscription to delegate read access on their MDK Log Analytics
workspace to Movate's Managed Grafana managed identity.
Customers deploy this template SCOPED TO THEIR LOG ANALYTICS WORKSPACE
RESOURCE GROUP (not their full subscription) — least privilege per
ADR 039 D2. The role granted is Monitoring Reader ONLY — read of
the workspace's metadata; NOT write, NOT secrets, NOT Key Vault, NOT
Revoke (customer side, takes effect immediately, no Movate cooperation):
See docs/movate-telemetry-onboarding.md for the end-to-end runbook.

metadata.description: Display name the customer sees in the Azure Portal under 'Service providers' — short, identifies Movate as the delegated provider.

mspOfferDescription.defaultValue: Grants Movate's Managed Grafana managed identity Monitoring Reader on this resource group's Log Analytics workspace so Movate can render fleet dashboards (metrics + span metadata only; no prompts, no PII). Per ADR 039.

metadata.description: Customer-facing description rendered alongside the offer name.
Movate's Entra tenant ID — the tenant the Grafana managed identity belongs to. Operator pastes this from the `managedIdentityTenantId` output of managed-grafana.bicep.

Object ID of Movate's Managed Grafana system-assigned managed identity. Operator pastes this from the `managedIdentityApplicationId` (a.k.a. `managedIdentityPrincipalId` — same value) output of managed-grafana.bicep. Lighthouse `principalId` accepts the objectId of the delegated principal in the service-provider tenant.

variables._comment_role: 43d0d8ad-25c7-4714-9337-8ba259a9fe05 = built-in Monitoring Reader. Read of Azure Monitor telemetry only. NO write, NO secrets, NO Key Vault data. Single, narrow role — DO NOT add additional authorizations without an ADR amendment (least-privilege contract from ADR 039 D2 + D3).

resources._comment: Lighthouse registrationDefinition — the offer itself. Tenant-scoped resource that customers create in their own subscription. The 2022-10-01 API version is the current GA.
resources.name: [variables('registrationName')]

authorizations._comment: Single authorization, single role. The principalId is the Movate Grafana MI's objectId. principalIdDisplayName is what shows up in the customer's audit trail when Grafana queries fire — operators see WHO is reading.

resources._comment: registrationAssignment — binds the above definition to THIS scope (the customer's LA workspace RG, since the template is deployed at resource-group scope). Without this, the definition exists but nothing is delegated. The assignment name is a guid over (resource group, registration definition) for idempotent re-deploys.
resources.name: [guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('registrationName'))]

registrationName._comment: Echo the generated registration name so the customer can pass it to `az managedservices assignment delete` when revoking.

delegatedRole.value: Monitoring Reader (43d0d8ad-25c7-4714-9337-8ba259a9fe05) — read of Azure Monitor telemetry only.
